attributes.action: Let the People Decide, Labour Must Step Down, Call an Emergency General Election
attributes.additional_details:
Many of us feel that the Government no longer reflects the promises, priorities, or mandate on which it was elected. Significant policy decisions, changes in direction, public dissatisfaction and our streets no longer being safe. 

The public deserves the chance to make its voice heard and to decide who should lead the nation going forward. This government has failed all of us. And our future generations yet to come. No one is safe anymore. We all live in fear. Something must be done!
attributes.background: Promises not kept, all lies. We call on the Government to step down and hold an emergency General Election. Many voters believe it no longer reflects the promises or priorities on which it was elected. We should have the opportunity to choose who governs the UK and determine the country’s future.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition: 

General election now – and always call one if a PM is replaced
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/771833
